payload.name: Fix student group submission workflow
payload.description: Fix the whole workflow of students submitting a group, coordinator approving it, and it showing in projects section. Currently a student submitted from there but it's not showing in bachelor projects or anywhere to coordinator. It should show in bachelor projects for bachelor and master for thesis with status pending. Need to trace the full flow: student group submission → coordinator view → approval → projects section display, and fix where the data is not being routed/filtered correctly.

goal.answer: Fix the end-to-end flow so that when a student responds to a bachelor (MINOR/MAJOR) announcement, a ProjectGroup is created with status PENDING and appears under the coordinator's Bachelor Projects section after approval; when a student responds to a THESIS (master) announcement, a Thesis record is created with status PENDING and appears under the coordinator's Master Thesis section after approval. Coordinator must be able to view all pending submissions from an announcement and approve them.

payload.plain: Fix the end-to-end flow so that when a student responds to a bachelor (MINOR/MAJOR) announcement, a ProjectGroup is created with status PENDING and appears under the coordinator's Bachelor Projects section after approval; when a student responds to a THESIS (master) announcement, a Thesis record is created with status PENDING and appears under the coordinator's Master Thesis section after approval. Coordinator must be able to view all pending submissions from an announcement and approve them.

criteria.answer:
Student submission for a MINOR/MAJOR announcement creates a ProjectGroup with status PENDING; a THESIS announcement creates a Thesis record with status PENDING.
Coordinator can open an announcement and see a list of all student submissions (groups/theses) tied to it, each with Edit and Approve actions.
Approving a submission sets its status from PENDING to ACTIVE and it immediately appears in the coordinator's Bachelor Projects or Master Thesis sections (filtered by the coordinator's department).
Once approved, the student's dashboard lists the submission under Projects or Theses and enables the existing project/thesis workflows (proposals, evaluations, etc.).
Existing flows (group invitations, supervisor assignment, evaluations, notifications) keep working for both bachelor groups and master theses.

plain: Student submission for a MINOR/MAJOR announcement creates a ProjectGroup with status PENDING; a THESIS announcement creates a Thesis record with status PENDING.
Coordinator can open an announcement and see a list of all student submissions (groups/theses) tied to it, each with Edit and Approve actions.
Approving a submission sets its status from PENDING to ACTIVE and it immediately appears in the coordinator's Bachelor Projects or Master Thesis sections (filtered by the coordinator's department).
Once approved, the student's dashboard lists the submission under Projects or Theses and enables the existing project/thesis workflows (proposals, evaluations, etc.).
Existing flows (group invitations, supervisor assignment, evaluations, notifications) keep working for both bachelor groups and master theses.

constraints.answer: Use the existing Prisma/Express/React stack; do not introduce new dependencies., Keep ProjectGroup for bachelor groups and Thesis for master theses; do not merge models., Preserve the existing bachelor group invitation/member flow., Coordinator approval only changes status to ACTIVE; supervisor assignment remains a separate action., All changes must pass existing linting/build commands if available.

plain: Use the existing Prisma/Express/React stack; do not introduce new dependencies.
Keep ProjectGroup for bachelor groups and Thesis for master theses; do not merge models.
Preserve the existing bachelor group invitation/member flow.
Coordinator approval only changes status to ACTIVE; supervisor assignment remains a separate action.
All changes must pass existing linting/build commands if available.

phases.answer: Backend schema and creation flow, Backend coordinator list APIs, Coordinator announcement submissions view, Student THESIS-aware submission form, End-to-end verification

phaseSnapshots.name: Backend schema and creation flow
phaseSnapshots.goal: Make the backend store thesis submissions in the Thesis table and link both groups and theses to their announcement.
phaseSnapshots.description: Add announcementId to Thesis model and relation, update Prisma schema, generate migration. Update studentGroupController.create to branch on announcement type: MINOR/MAJOR creates a ProjectGroup; THESIS creates a Thesis record. Fix isStudentAlreadyInAGroupAnnouncement to scope thesis checks by announcementId. Update /api/stats to include pendingTheses.

steps.description: Update schema.prisma: add optional announcementId and relation on Thesis; add inverse theses relation on Announcement.

verification.command: npx prisma migrate dev --name add_thesis_announcement --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma validate --schema backend/prisma/schema.prisma

steps.description: Refactor studentGroupController.create to create a Thesis for THESIS announcements and ProjectGroup for MINOR/MAJOR, both with status PENDING and announcementId set.
Update announcementService.isStudentAlreadyInAGroupAnnouncement to scope THESIS checks by announcementId.

phaseSnapshots.name: Backend coordinator list APIs
phaseSnapshots.goal: Enable coordinator to fetch pending/active submissions filtered by announcement and status.
phaseSnapshots.description: Add optional announcementId and status query filters to groupController.getGroups and thesisController.getTheses. Ensure coordinator department filter still applies. Add backend routes if needed for fetching submissions by announcement.

steps.description: Add announcementId and status filters to GET /api/groups and GET /api/theses.
Add or reuse endpoint that returns both groups and theses for a given announcement (optional helper).

phaseSnapshots.name: Coordinator announcement submissions view
phaseSnapshots.goal: Build the UI for coordinator to see and approve pending submissions per announcement.
phaseSnapshots.description: Update Announcements.jsx to add a 'View Submissions' action on each announcement. The submissions modal/drawer lists ProjectGroup records for MINOR/MAJOR and Thesis records for THESIS. Each row shows project/title title, student(s), status, and Approve/Edit buttons. Approve calls the existing status endpoint to set ACTIVE.

steps.description: Add View Submissions UI and fetch groups/theses filtered by announcementId.
Implement Approve button that calls PUT /api/groups/:id/status or PUT /api/theses/:id/status with ACTIVE.

phaseSnapshots.name: Student THESIS-aware submission form
phaseSnapshots.goal: Make the student group creation form behave correctly for THESIS announcements.
phaseSnapshots.description: Update student Groups.jsx so that when the selected announcement type is THESIS, the form hides member invitation UI, disables multi-member logic, and after submission redirects or refreshes the theses list. Ensure the existing MINOR/MAJOR flow is unchanged.

steps.description: Hide invite/member picker for THESIS announcements in the create form.
After successful THESIS submission, refresh student's theses list or redirect to /student/theses.

phaseSnapshots.name: End-to-end verification
phaseSnapshots.goal: Confirm the full workflow works manually.
phaseSnapshots.description: Run backend and frontend, create MINOR and THESIS announcements as coordinator, submit as student, verify pending items appear in coordinator announcement submissions, approve them, and verify they appear in Bachelor Projects / Master Thesis and student Projects / Theses.

steps.description: Run backend and frontend and perform manual E2E walkthrough.

assumptions.answer: THESIS announcements are always single-member and for MASTER students.; Approval means setting status from PENDING to ACTIVE without requiring a supervisor.; The existing ProjectDetail page already works for both groups and theses once the correct records exist.; The user can run Prisma migrations and restart the backend/frontend.

payload.summary: Phase 1 completed: added announcementId to Thesis, synced the database, refactored student group creation to produce Thesis records for THESIS announcements and ProjectGroup records for MINOR/MAJOR, scoped the thesis duplicate check by announcement, and confirmed stats already exposes pendingTheses.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

payload.summary: Phase 2 completed: GET /api/groups and GET /api/theses now accept announcementId and status query filters, enabling the coordinator announcement submissions view to fetch pending groups and theses per announcement. The optional combined endpoint was skipped because two targeted calls are sufficient.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.
